title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.496 - Permanent select committee on ethics
text:
105.496.  Permanent select committee on ethics. — Upon the convening of the next general assembly after January 1, 1991, the house of representatives and the senate shall each, respectively, establish by rule a permanent select committee on ethics and shall adopt the rules by which the manner and method of investigations and disciplinary proceedings and actions shall be conducted.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1650 & 1565 § 8) 
Effective 1-01-91
